storyInfo: As the two guides argue about which one is the real Oakley, Gordon Tannen realizes that he has been letting an impostor run free on Propeller Paradise for the past month. Fortunately, the impostor was only a tour guide who sneaked in to try to help a Banshee client. Meanwhile, the owner of Lucky Cystybeast follows instructions from a mysterious source to Tannen's secret collection room.

attributes.content: Shit, bro, take my name if you want, but you didn't have to steal my entire past!
attributes.name: Oakley?

attributes.content: How dare you slander me! I wrote the entire application myself!
attributes.name: Oakley!

attributes.content: Can you recite it from memory?
attributes.name: Oakley?

attributes.content: H-How am I supposed to pull something I wrote a year ago from memory?
attributes.name: Oakley!

attributes.content: 'Oakley, born in Bunkerhill, graduate of Trimounts College of Arts and Science, previously worked as a guide in the Human Development and Technological Inovation Department of the District Convention Center...'
attributes.name: Oakley?

attributes.content: 'Innovation' is misspelled.
attributes.name: Oakley?

attributes.content: You! Damn you, if I didn't lose my terminal and CV—
attributes.name: Oakley!

attributes.text: Gordon's head has never hurt so badly.
The holes in the onboarding process are obvious upon further inspection. But the real question is—
Why would she impersonate a guide?
Is she a Leithanian spy? A DOD agent? Or a pair of eyes that D.C. is keeping on him?
The impostor has already made contact with many corporations at the preview exhibition. Dealing with her now means broadcasting his negligence to the whole country.
Besides, Gordon has no idea how much she knows, and whether she has ill intentions towards him and Columbia...

attributes.content: Gordon does not dare to think about it any further.
Your gaze wanders when you speak. Your voice is trembling, and you talk without rhyme or reason.
attributes.name: Oakley?

attributes.content: I doubt Mr. Tannen would want such an 'Oakley' to handle promotion work.
attributes.name: Oakley?

attributes.content: Don't bring Mr. Tannen into this! I tell you—
attributes.name: Oakley!

attributes.content: Shut up!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Perhaps you need a little time to calm down, 'Mister' Oakley. Come with me to the reception room to rest for a while.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Mr. Tannen, I...
attributes.name: Oakley?

attributes.content: Listen up. I just pulled your activity records from the park here. It won't be hard to figure out just who you are.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: One more lie, and I'm throwing you off this plate. It won't matter who you are when you're a puddle on the ground six hundred meters down. You get me?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Now talk. Who are you?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: ...A guide.
attributes.name: Oakley?

attributes.content: You got balls, I'll give you that.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Th-The kind of guide the tourists need!
attributes.name: Oakley?

attributes.content: My name is Ferne. I-I'm a tour guide.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: My apologies, Mr. Oakley. Mr. Tannen will make sure that this matter is dealt with promptly.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Do you believe me now?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Of course. You can reach me through this terminal if you need anything. Now, get some rest. I'll be going.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Alright.
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Done.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Read the room and avert potential risks for your boss...
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Another rule for secretaries.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: You said Oakley got himself drunk a month ago after a breakup, and he gave you his resume instead of his contact info, which gave you a chance to sneak into Propeller Paradise under his identity?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: That's right.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Your client was an old Banshee who somehow got lost in the Bleached Wasteland. Her memory was hazy and it was difficult to communicate with her?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You suspected that she was ill, and you were asking around under the guise of a guide to make her journey a smooth one, which is why you looked like you were up to something?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Exactly!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You've spent a whole month here. You know this is no ordinary place. If you're a foreign spy, the military take you in for questioning, torture, and you'll never again see the light of day.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: If you're an agent from the Department of Defense, D.C. won't let you off the hook. They'll disavow, distort, and even dispose of you, all for the sake of tipping the scales to their side.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: If you're a District plant, then you've learned too much, and ATAO taught me plenty of ways to help you 'forget'.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: But you're just a tour guide who cares for her client. You're a good person.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: And Columbia will do good by a good person.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: You aren't going to press charges?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Believe me, I'd love to, but too many corporations have noticed your performance at the pre-expo. You'll deal with your problems and get lost before they find out who you are.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: The longer you stay, the more I have to compensate the poor guy whose name you stole. If all you want to do is to clear the mind of your Banshee client, I can help.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: You know about Banshees?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I know how to solve your problem.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Floating botanical unit connected.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Bioelectrical signal detected. Charging drive unit.
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: Phew... that's the smoothest these experiments have gone, isn't it?
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: No, this voice... the short-circuit protection has kicked in.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: (In Sarkaz) Unravel.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: (In Sarkaz) Unravel!
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Hmph.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You shouldn't touch an overloaded converter with your bare hands, Director!
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: Works better than an incantation. How are the readings?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: By exhibition standards, the technology for high-altitude energy transmission through plants is sufficiently mature. By the standards of your expectations for the project, however...
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: Not good enough. The energy transmission threshold for the floating botanical unit falls short of theoretical values.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: That prickly Forte kid would chill out a bit if you said as much to him...
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: Sky is inexperienced, but he was right about one thing—this Vivarium is Kristen's legacy, and we owe it to her to do our best.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You were always stubborn, going back to when we dug out the S.H.A.F.T. together five years ago.
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: You pulled all-nighters to ensure its structural integrity, enchanting the core materials with incantations. Nothing could get you to take a break, not even your favorite gummy worms.
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: If you want to go fincatching, do it at Lake Sulligan. Assuming I approve your leave request, of course.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Besides, I worked so many hours just because I was inefficient. I learned to write curses too late. My incantations suffer in strength and precision compared to my kindred, because they rely on sound as the sole medium.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Is that why you modified your bone pen and use hole-punched paper tapes to supplement your casting?
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: Yes. I took a lot of wrong turns.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Nasti takes out her bone pen, a plain, unornamented object resembling Rhine's technological creations.
She inserts it into a sapling in the Vivarium, and a white glow rises from the roots, through the branches and into every leaf.
It is as though a command has been entered into the whole Vivarium; terminals begin to execute programs, automatically recording plant energy conversion data.
Such an efficient programming language, your incantations...
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: Then, we should make more efficient decisions at this bottleneck, despite the risks.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Do you mean...?
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: Review the report again. Thank you for your work.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Yes, ma'am.
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: Hello, this is the Rhine Vivarium Lab.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Hello, Director Lunorey. Mr. Tannen has asked me to express his gratitude at your reasonable accommodation that led to successful cooperation the last time.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: There are some follow-up matters to be discussed. Do you have time this afternoon?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Excellent. I will see you in the Vivarium in an hour.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Ride the ropeway to Flying Donut station, then take the ring corridor...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: I'm in the right place, aren't I? It's dark in here. Where's the light...?
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Good heavens... wh-where am I?!
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Intruder alert, intruder alert.
attributes.name: Unknown Entity

attributes.content: Activating bio-scan. Analyzing results. Species: Terran. Sex: Male. Threat level: Pending.
attributes.name: Unknown Entity

attributes.content: A-A talking finbeast?
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Mind your words, foolish Terran! I am Space Fin 054. State your Universe ID number, immediately!
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: Universe ID...?
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: (Whisper) Your corporate name, nitwit!
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: Oh, uh, Lucky Cystybeast Food and Beverage.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Ah, so you are the partner that 'Sky Conqueror' was expecting. How unfortunate that I won't get the chance to test my laser cannons.
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: (Whisper) Don't touch anything. The supervisor will be here momentarily.
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: Supervisor?
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Five-Four, make sure you speak like an extraterrestrial entity next time you do the client explanation thing.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Aye aye, sir.
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: M-Mr. Tannen?
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Shh—don't huff and puff. The polite thing to do when you stand in this collection of unique curiosities, the likes of which you will not find anywhere else in Terra, is to admire it with your eyes.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Look at the wall on your right. Five years ago, I confiscated the possessions of a pioneer trying to illegally cross the border, and found an unusual water circulation and filtration system in his trailer.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: He helped me find the core component in exchange for looking the other way. When the unit was assembled, I identified it as a Locus of Sorcery—a Sarkaz witchcraft weapon.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: My goodness, it must be dangerous...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Turn around and look behind you. This is a trident Arts unit from Leithanien, created by Witch King cultists who wanted to amplify Arts output so they could rip apart the fabric of reality and summon their master.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Kinda crazy, sure, but its conversion efficiency is fifty times the max allowed by Propeller Paradise regulations. Even an onion could fly with it.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Wait, so you solved One-Boot's technical issues with... contraband?
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Contraband? ATAO made up the stupid rule about only using parts made in Columbia!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I don't know and I don't care about the reasons behind the decisions. All I know is that these rules are un-Columbian. They restrict scientists, and force entrepreneurs to lie!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: It was a single humble ATAO officer who imported inventions from across Terra into Propeller Paradise, forming the heart and soul of one-third of all levitating facilities here.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: One-third... you've run hundreds of smuggling operations without getting exposed?
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Every transaction, every deal has gone without a hitch under my management. Not even my secretary Merry knows my secrets.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I... I need time to think about this, Mr. Tannen...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Lucky Cystybeast has one day left, and I got other things on my plate. I'll give you five seconds.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Lucky Cystybeast gets a mongrel heart, or you let it die to your stubborn pride. Choose.
attributes.name: Gordon
